events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: a click-type torque wrench used upside down defeats its internal click mechanism regardless of dial setting, and combined with unverified calibration, no fastener tightened this way can be trusted to meet OEM spec — this is a shortcut, not acceptable practice. Decision: **fail**, risk **high**, with corrective actions to pull the tool, verify calibration, and audit/re-torque affected fasteners.
